description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Friday, April 24, I attended the opening ceremony for the rebuilt Higashi-Agano police box (東吾野駐在所).

The Higashi-Agano police box is the community's closest point of contact and serves as a vital hub for protecting the safety and security of local residents. With this newly rebuilt facility as a foundation, I hope the police will work even more closely with residents, become more deeply woven into community life, and continue to serve as a reassuring and dependable presence that supports our daily lives.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13484.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Opening ceremony for Higashi-Agano police box
